auth.account_locked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again later.
auth.weak_password: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.refresh_token_reused: Refresh token reuse detected. The session has been revoked.
auth.no_tenant_membership: This account has no membership in the requested tribe.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

view_request.invalid_state: This action is not allowed in the request's current state.
view_request.id_required: An ID attachment is required for this tribe.

upload.file_too_large: The file exceeds the size limit.
upload.unsupported_type: Unsupported file type. Only images (PNG/JPEG/WEBP/GIF) and PDF are accepted.

tenant.slug_taken: This slug is already in use.

person.version_conflict: The record was modified by someone else. Reload and try again.
person.duplicate_candidates: Similar people already exist. Confirm to proceed.
person.self_ancestry: This change would make a person their own ancestor.
person.parent_not_found: The referenced parent does not exist.

union.invalid_genders: A union requires a male husband and a female wife.

change_request.invalid_state: This action is not allowed in the request's current state.
change_request.not_owner: Only the request owner can perform this action.
change_request.cannot_review_own: You cannot review your own change request.
change_request.target_required: A target is required for update/delete operations.
change_request.already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this request.

import.invalid_state: This action is not allowed in the batch's current state.
import.unsupported_format: Unsupported file type. Only xlsx and CSV are accepted.
import.file_too_large: The file exceeds the 50 MB limit.
import.plan_limit_exceeded: This import would exceed your plan's person limit.
import.has_errors: The batch still has error rows. Fix them or submit a partial import.
import.rollback_blocked: Rollback is blocked: later records depend on this batch.
import.nothing_to_import: There are no rows to import.

row.invalid_gender: Gender must be male or female.
row.father_not_found: Referenced father could not be resolved.
row.mother_not_found: Referenced mother could not be resolved.
row.father_must_be_male: The referenced father is not male.
row.mother_must_be_female: The referenced mother is not female.
row.cycle: This row would create an ancestry cycle.
row.ambiguous_ref: The reference matches more than one person; pick one.
